text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared, name a card - after each time your opponent plays that card during this conflict, choose an unclaimed ring and claim it as a [conflict-political] ring, gaining all fate from it. (Unlimited.)
name: Shiro Kitsuki

text: During a conflict at this province, when a player would claim the contested ring, return it to the unclaimed ring pool instead. (If this province breaks, the ring is claimed as normal.)
name: Henshin Mysteries

text: Seeker role only. Action: During a conflict at this province, choose a character you control and select one - either move that character to the conflict or move it home.
name: Smuggler's Cove

text: This character gets +1 glory for each holding in play. Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending - search the top 5 cards of your dynasty deck for a holding and put it into play in the attacked province, discarding each other card in that province. Shuffle.
name: Frontline Engineer

text: Interrupt: When the holding's province would be broken, your opponent choose an attacking character - discard that character.
name: Strategic Weakpoint

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - during each player's next action opportunity in this conflict, decrease the cost to play cards by 1.
name: Court Musician

text: Disguised Courtier. Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict in which this character is participating - draw 1 card for each card you opponent has played in this conflict.
flavorText: "Many thanks for the invitation to your court. I hope to learn many of your ways while I am here."
name: Daidoji Kageyu

text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character enters play - place 1 fate on each unclaimed ring.
flavorText: "Stripped by the wave, the wasteland becomes a battlefield." - Togashi Yokuni
name: Army of the Rising Wave

text: Reaction: After this character loses a conflict as an attacker, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent – your opponent discards 1 random card from his or her hand.
name: Quarrelsome Youth

text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, if you have fewer cards in you hand than your opponent - put a non-unique Bushi character with printed cost 2 or less into play from your dynasty discard pile.
name: Unified Company

text:
Pride.
During a conflict in which this character is participating, it gains +2[conflict-military] for each other participating dishonored character and +2[conflict-political] for each other participating honored character.
name: Asako Takahiro

text: This character cannot be declared as an attacker against a less honorable player than you.
flavorText: "Allow none save the servants to pass. And when they have passed, make note of their names." - Bayushi Kachiko
name: Palace Guard

text: Each Imperial character you control gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political].
flavorText: For imperial bureaucrats who cannot live in Otosan Uchi, a beautiful estate in one of the surrounding Petal Villages touts their noble station.
name: Petal Village Estate

text: Action: During a conflict, choose an unbroken province - resolve that province's action ability as if the conflict were at that province.
flavorText: "I promise to call upon you only at greatest need."
name: Keeper of Secret Names

text: Reaction: After an opponent plays an event that chooses a [clan-crab] character you control as a target - place 1 fate on that character. (Max 1 per phase.)
name: Withstand the Darkness

text: Attach to a unique [clan-crane] character you control. Ancestral. Restricted. If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – switch the conflict type."
name: Shukujo

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, return a ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a participating character with printed cost 3 or lower - bow that character.
name: Deduction

text: Action: During a conflict in which attached character is participating, choose a participating Bushi character - ready that character.
flavorText: "In the chaos of war, the chain of command unites the valor of samurai." - Akodo's Leadership
name: Fan of Command

text: Attach to a Courtier character. Reaction: After you play a card during a conflict in which attached character is participating - attached character gets +1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict. (Unlimited.)
name: Erudite Prestige

text: Action: During a conflict, if your honor bid is higher than you opponent's, choose a participating Bushi character you control and a participating character your opponent controls - until the end of the conflict, set your character's base [conflict-military] skill to the current [conflict-military] skill of your opponent's character.
name: By Any Means

text: Attach to a Shugenja character you control. Action: During a conflict – take two actions.
flavorText: "I know of no kami that live on the banks of the Beryt. Yet show one its majesty and the roar of a cataract will never leave you."
name: Current of the Beryt

text: Reaction: After an opponent's province is revealed during a conflict, choose a non-unique character - that character cannot be declared as a defender in this conflict. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: "Do not follow the roads you foe lays out for you. Blaze your own." - from the tactics of Shinjo Khulan Khan
name: Outflank
